name: PyHMT2D
author: PSU-EFD
description: Python-based Hydraulic Modeling Tools for 2D simulations — SRH-2D, HEC-RAS 2D, and more.
readmeContent:
# PyHMT2D

Python-based Hydraulic Modeling Tools for 2D simulations.

PyHMT2D provides a unified Python interface for 2D hydraulic models including SRH-2D, HEC-RAS 2D, and others. It supports mesh generation, model setup, simulation execution, and post-processing of results.

## Installation

```bash
pip install PyHMT2D
```

## Features

- SRH-2D model interface
- HEC-RAS 2D model interface
- Mesh generation and manipulation
- Result post-processing and visualization
- Batch simulation support

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/psu-efd/PyHMT2D)
- [Documentation](https://pyhmt2d.readthedocs.io/)
llmsInstallationContent:
## Installation Instructions

1. Run in terminal: `pip install PyHMT2D`
2. The package provides 2D hydraulic modeling capabilities.
3. After installation, register as an MCP server in your aihydro_mcp_settings.json.
4. See the GitHub README for detailed configuration.
